sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_points (id UInt64, point S2Point) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO geo_points VALUES (1, toS2Point(37.7749, -122.4194)), (2, toS2Point(34.0522, -118.2437));
SELECT s2CapContains(1157339245694594829, 1.0, point) AS capContains FROM geo_points WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE geo_points SET point = toS2Point(40.7128, -74.0060) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT s2CapContains(1157339245694594829, 5.0, point) AS capContains FROM geo_points WHERE id = 2;
